title: Stranger Realms - Upside Down
description: The familiar world is shadowed by a terrifying, inverted dimension - the Upside Down. A dark survival challenge inspired by Stranger Things.
body:
# 🔮 Stranger Realms — The Upside Down Awaits

The familiar world is shadowed by a terrifying, inverted dimension — the Upside Down.

Stranger Realms is a unique BentoBox game mode inspired by the concept of parallel dark dimensions. Your players inhabit a normal island, but beneath it (or alongside it) lurks a twisted mirror world filled with danger, darkness, and mystery.

## 🎮 How It Works

- 🌍 **Two dimensions** — a normal island and its dark mirror counterpart
- 🌑 **The Upside Down** — an inverted, hostile version of your island
- ⚔️ **Survive both** — resources and challenges span both dimensions
- 🔮 **Cross between worlds** — portals connect the normal and dark realms
- 👥 **Multiplayer** — teams face the darkness together

## ⚙️ Features

- **Unique dual-world concept** — nothing else like it in the BentoBox ecosystem
- **Atmospheric gameplay** — darkness, danger, and exploration
- **Full team system** — protection, roles, and permissions
- **All BentoBox addons compatible**
- **Free and open source**

## 📦 Installation

Requires **BentoBox** on a **Paper** server.

1. Install [BentoBox](https://modrinth.com/plugin/bentobox)
2. Place `StrangerRealms.jar` into `plugins/BentoBox/addons/`
3. Restart

📖 Docs: [docs.bentobox.world](https://docs.bentobox.world) | 💬 Discord: [discord.gg/BentoBoxWorld](https://discord.gg/BentoBoxWorld)
